scripts.build: npm run build:aws && npm run build:k8s && npm run build:gitlab
scripts.deploy-infra: aws cloudformation deploy --template-file templates/template.json --stack-name cells-cluster --capabilities CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM --region ${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1}
scripts.apply: npm run apply:system && npm run apply:cells
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run deploy-infra && npm run configure-kubectl && npm run load-outputs && npm run build:k8s && npm run apply
